title: The Substituted Fire Tables
description: Two sets of printed fire table pages, side by side on McCormick's map table. The authentic version — signed by McCormick in blue ink at 23:00 on May 27th — shows barrage lifts advancing on a tightly timed rolling schedule coordinated with the infantry advance on a northeast axis. The substituted version uses identical paper and typography but shifts the eastern-sector lifts 200 meters ahead of schedule, creating a gap in coverage over the approach corridor from grid reference 8-Echo. The substitution is detectable only by comparing the two documents: the authentic version has a minor ink smear on the lower-left corner where McCormick's signet ring dragged; the substitute is clean.
